nodes.name: Start: Research Next Company
nodes.notes: Click 'Execute Workflow' to research the next pending company.

nodes.name: Schedule: Check for Ready Drafts
nodes.notes: Every 30 min, checks if any drafts/{company}_drafts.txt has EMAIL blocks to send.

nodes.name: Run: Research Pipeline
nodes.notes: Runs DuckDuckGo search + Hunter.io email finding + verification + prompt generation. Takes 2-3 minutes.

nodes.name: Emails Found?
nodes.notes: Routes to Read Prompt if research succeeded (status=ok), otherwise skips company.

nodes.name: Log Skipped Company
nodes.notes: Company had no valid emails. Pipeline already marked it completed. Loops back to research the next company.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'all_done', message: '🎉 All companies completed!' } }];
